development_type: Multi dwelling housing and Subdivision — Strata title (14 lots)
notes: VERIFIED REFUSED — Wollongong Local Planning Panel (WLPP) decision, 4 June 2024. Unanimous refusal. Panel: Stephen Davies (Chair), Garry Chapman, Jan Murrell. Refusal reasons: riparian land (Cl 7.4 Wollongong LEP 2009), flooding (Cl 5.21), building height (Cl 4.3), earthworks (Cl 7.6), stormwater — not a zoning or lot-size refusal. Referral: 10+ unique objections (51 first round, 13 second round). Zone R2 confirmed via NSW Planning Portal Layer 11 at parcel centroid. LGA: WOLLONGONG confirmed. Min lot 449m² (Layer 14). No EPI flood, no heritage, no bushfire at parcel centroid via Planning Portal APIs. (Note: site has riparian land constraint from Category 2 watercourse — this is NOT captured by the EPI Flood layer, which explains the API showing no flood while the WLPP refused for flooding/riparian reasons.) Parcel centroid from NSW Cadastre direct query (lotidstring=101//DP1240973): lat=-34.397856, lon=150.881901. Planlotarea=8,369m². DEV TYPE DIFFERENCE: This is a 14-lot strata multi-dwelling DA, not a 2-lot Torrens. Larger and more complex than typical sample rows. MODEL IMPLICATION: SiteVerdict may score REVIEW (65-79) for this refused DA because it does not model riparian land constraints explicitly. This makes it a useful edge-case test — expected outcome = model overscores a refused site.
reason_not_ready: DA type mismatch: 14-lot strata vs typical 2-lot Torrens in sample. Refusal is flood/riparian-based — SiteVerdict does not model riparian constraints. Insert as refused row but note in validation that a false positive is expected here due to model gap.
